world.title: Australia coach Popovic has contract renewed until 2027
world.description: Australia coach Tony Popovic has had his contract renewed until 2027 on the eve of the team's first World Cup match on Saturday against Turkey. Football Australia said that Popovic will now stay on until next year's Asian Cup in Saudi Arabia.
